e.p: What's your favorite food?
e.m: 1) Nói tên món ăn bạn thích. 2) Nêu 1 lý do ngắn (vì ngon/nhanh/đơn giản).
e.h: I like + N. / It is + adj.
e.s: I like pizza. It is tasty.

e.p: Do you eat it often?
e.m: 1) Nói tần suất bạn ăn món đó (always/often/sometimes/never). 2) Nói nơi bạn thường ăn nó.
e.h: Use frequency adverb + present simple; at/in/at home.
e.s: I often eat it. I eat it at home.

e.p: How do you usually eat it?
e.m: 1) Mô tả cách bạn ăn (ví dụ: with hands/with fork). 2) Nói nó nóng hay lạnh.
e.h: Use 'I eat it with...' và 'It is hot/cold.'
e.s: I eat it with a fork. It is hot.

e.p: How much does a portion cost?
e.m: 1) Nói giá bằng một con số ví dụ (a few dollars). 2) Nói bạn có đủ tiền để mua không (yes/no).
e.h: Use 'It costs...' và 'I can/cannot buy it.'
e.s: It costs three dollars. I can buy it.

e.p: Would you like to recommend it to a friend?
e.m: 1) Nói nếu bạn muốn giới thiệu (yes/no). 2) Nói lý do ngắn cho quyết định đó.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I would.' or 'No, I would not.' + because...
e.s: Yes, I would. Because it tastes good.

e.p: What do you drink in the morning?
e.m: 1) Nói tên đồ uống sáng bạn thường uống. 2) Nói bạn thích nóng hay lạnh.
e.h: I drink + N. / I like it hot/cold.
e.s: I drink tea. I like it hot.

e.p: Do you make it at home or buy it?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn làm ở nhà hay mua ngoài. 2) Nói tần suất (always/often/sometimes).
e.h: Use 'I make it at home' or 'I buy it'. + frequency adverb.
e.s: I make it at home. I always make it.

e.p: How much sugar do you add?
e.m: 1) Nói lượng đường (no sugar/a little/more). 2) Nói nếu bạn prefer milk or not.
e.h: Use 'I add...' and 'I like/don't like milk.'
e.s: I add a little sugar. I do not like milk.

e.p: Who do you drink with in the morning?
e.m: 1) Nói người bạn thường uống cùng (family/friend). 2) Nói nơi (in the kitchen/at work).
e.h: Use 'with my...' and 'in/at...'
e.s: I drink with my family. We drink in the kitchen.

e.p: Do you want another cup now?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có muốn thêm một cốc hay không (yes/no). 2) Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want...' or 'No, I do not want...' + reason.
e.s: Yes, I want another cup. Because I am still thirsty.

e.p: What do you eat for lunch at school?
e.m: 1) Nói tên đồ ăn bạn ăn ở trường. 2) Nói nếu bạn like it or not.
e.h: I eat + N. / I like it / I do not like it.
e.s: I eat a sandwich. I like it.

e.p: How many students eat in the canteen?
e.m: 1) Nói số lượng (a few/two/many). 2) Nói if it is crowded or not.
e.h: Use 'There are + number + N' and 'It is + adj.'
e.s: There are many students. It is crowded.

e.p: Who prepares your lunch?
e.m: 1) Nói người chuẩn bị (mother/father/school). 2) Nói if you help or not.
e.h: Use 'My... prepares it.' and 'I help / I do not help.'
e.s: My mother prepares it. I do not help.

e.p: Do you eat fast or slowly?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn ăn nhanh hay chậm. 2) Nói lý do ngắn (because of time/homework...).
e.h: Use 'I eat fast/slowly.' + because...
e.s: I eat fast. Because I have little time.

e.p: Can you buy drinks at school?
e.m: 1) Nói có thể mua hay không (yes/no). 2) Nói đồ uống bạn mua nếu có.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I can.' or 'No, I cannot.' and 'I buy...'
e.s: Yes, I can. I buy water.

e.p: What snack would you like?
e.m: 1) Nói tên đồ ăn vặt bạn muốn. 2) Nói bạn want it now or later.
e.h: I want + N. / I want it now/later.
e.s: I want a cookie. I want it now.

e.p: How much is the snack?
e.m: 1) Nói giá (a dollar/three dollars). 2) Nói bạn have enough money or not.
e.h: Use 'It costs...' and 'I have / I do not have ...'.
e.s: It costs two dollars. I have enough money.

e.p: Do you eat it on the way?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có ăn khi đi hay không. 2) Nói nơi bạn will eat it.
e.h: Use 'I eat it on the way.' or 'I do not eat it.' + place.
e.s: I eat it on the way. I eat it on the bus.

e.p: Would you like a drink with it?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có muốn đồ uống kèm hay không. 2) Nói loại đồ uống bạn chọn.
e.h: Yes/No + I want + N.
e.s: Yes, I want a drink. I want water.

e.p: Do you share snacks with friends?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có chia sẻ hay không. 2) Nói who you share with.
e.h: Use 'I share / I do not share.' + with my friend/mother.
e.s: I share snacks. I share with my friend.

e.p: Can I take your order?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn muốn món nào. 2) Nói bạn want it spicy or not.
e.h: Use 'I want + N.' and 'I want it spicy / not spicy.'
e.s: I want chicken. I do not want it spicy.

e.p: Do you want a drink with that?
e.m: 1) Nói có muốn đồ uống hay không. 2) Nói loại đồ uống bạn muốn.
e.h: Yes/No + I want + N.
e.s: Yes, I want a drink. I want orange juice.

e.p: How many people are eating?
e.m: 1) Nói số người (one/two/three). 2) Nói if a child is with you or not.
e.h: Use 'There are + number + people' and 'There is a child / There is no child.'
e.s: There are three people. There is no child.

e.p: Do you want dessert after the meal?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có muốn tráng miệng hay không. 2) Nói loại tráng miệng nếu có.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want...' or 'No, I do not want...'.
e.s: No, I do not want dessert. I am full.

e.p: Is everything ok with your food?
e.m: 1) Nói món ăn có ổn không (ok/not ok). 2) Nói bạn want a change or help.
e.h: Use 'It is ok.' or 'It is not ok.' + 'I want...'
e.s: It is not ok. I want a new dish.

e.p: What are you cooking now?
e.m: 1) Nói món bạn đang nấu (present continuous). 2) Nói if it smells good.
e.h: Use 'I am cooking + N.' and 'It smells + adj.'
e.s: I am cooking soup. It smells good.

e.p: Do you need any help in the kitchen?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn cần giúp hay không. 2) Nói việc bạn cần giúp (cut vegetables/wash dishes).
e.h: Use 'I need help / I do not need help.' + to V or noun.
e.s: I need help. Please cut the vegetables.

e.p: How many eggs do you use?
e.m: 1) Nói số trứng bạn dùng. 2) Nói if you want more or less.
e.h: Use 'I use + number + eggs.' and 'I want more/less.'
e.s: I use two eggs. I want no more.

e.p: Do you prefer cooking alone or with family?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn thích nấu một mình hay với gia đình. 2) Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use 'I prefer...' + reason.
e.s: I prefer cooking with my family. Because it is fun.

e.p: What time do you usually start cooking?
e.m: 1) Nói giờ bạn bắt đầu nấu ăn (present simple). 2) Nói how often (every day/sometimes).
e.h: Use 'I start cooking at...' and frequency adverb.
e.s: I start cooking at six. I cook every day.

e.p: Do you like eating out with friends?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có thích đi ăn cùng bạn hay không. 2) Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use 'I like / I do not like.' + because...
e.s: I like eating out with friends. Because we talk a lot.

e.p: Who pays the bill usually?
e.m: 1) Nói ai thường trả tiền. 2) Nói if you share the cost or not.
e.h: Use 'My friend / I / We' + 'pay(s)' and 'We share / We do not share.'
e.s: My friend pays the bill. We do not share the cost.

e.p: What time do you meet your friends for dinner?
e.m: 1) Nói giờ bạn hẹn gặp (e.g., at seven). 2) Nói frequency (often/sometimes).
e.h: Use 'We meet at...' and frequency adverb.
e.s: We meet at seven. We often meet on Friday.

e.p: Do you order for the group or each person orders?
e.m: 1) Nói nhóm gọi chung hay mỗi người gọi. 2) Nói which option you prefer.
e.h: Use 'We order together / Each person orders.' and 'I prefer...'
e.s: Each person orders. I prefer this option.

e.p: Is someone allergic to food in your group?
e.m: 1) Nói có ai dị ứng hay không. 2) Nói what food they avoid if yes.
e.h: Use 'Yes, there is / No, there is not.' + 'They avoid...'
e.s: No, there is not. They avoid peanuts.

d.t: Thói quen ăn uống hàng ngày

e.p: What do you eat every morning?
e.m: 1) Nói thức ăn bạn ăn mỗi sáng. 2) Nói if you always eat it or sometimes.
e.h: Use 'I eat...' and frequency adverb.
e.s: I eat cereal every morning. I always eat it.

e.p: Do you skip meals sometimes?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có bỏ bữa không. 2) Nói which meal you skip and why.
e.h: Use 'I skip...' and 'Because...'
e.s: Yes, I skip breakfast sometimes. Because I am busy.

e.p: How many times do you eat out in a week?
e.m: 1) Nói số lần bạn ăn ngoài trong tuần. 2) Nói if this is more or less than before.
e.h: Use 'I eat out + number + times.' and 'It is more/less.'
e.s: I eat out three times a week. It is more than before.

e.p: Do you drink water during meals?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có uống nước khi ăn hay không. 2) Nói amount (a little/a lot).
e.h: Use 'I drink water.' and 'a little / a lot.'
e.s: Yes, I drink water during meals. I drink a lot.

e.p: What do you need for a healthy meal?
e.m: 1) Nói 1 món bạn cần (vegetable/protein). 2) Nói if you eat it every day.
e.h: Use 'We need...' and 'I eat it every day / sometimes.'
e.s: We need vegetables. I eat them every day.

e.p: Do you try local food when you travel?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có thử đồ ăn địa phương hay không. 2) Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use 'I try / I do not try.' + because...
e.s: Yes, I try local food. Because it is new.

e.p: Where do you usually eat in a new city?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn ăn ở nhà hàng hay quán nhỏ. 2) Nói if you prefer street food or restaurant.
e.h: Use 'I eat at...' and 'I prefer...'
e.s: I eat at small local restaurants. I prefer street food.

e.p: How many days do you eat local food on a trip?
e.m: 1) Nói số ngày bạn ăn đồ địa phương. 2) Nói if you like the food there.
e.h: Use 'I eat local food for + number + days.' and 'I like / I do not like.'
e.s: I eat local food for three days. I like the food there.

e.p: Do you worry about food safety abroad?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có lo lắng hay không. 2) Nói what you do to be safe (drink bottled water/avoid raw).
e.h: Use 'I am worried / I am not worried.' and 'I drink / I avoid...'
e.s: I am a little worried. I drink bottled water.

e.p: Can you eat the same food as at home on a trip?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có thể ăn đồ giống ở nhà hay không. 2) Nói if you miss home food.
e.h: Use 'I can / I cannot.' and 'I miss / I do not miss...'
e.s: I cannot eat the same food as at home. I miss home food.

e.p: Are you vegetarian or not?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có ăn chay hay không. 2) Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use 'I am vegetarian.' or 'I am not vegetarian.' + because...
e.s: I am not vegetarian. Because I like meat.

e.p: What foods do vegetarians avoid?
e.m: 1) Nói 1 loại thực phẩm họ tránh (meat/fish). 2) Nói if you eat that food.
e.h: Use 'They avoid...' and 'I eat / I do not eat it.'
e.s: They avoid meat. I eat meat.

e.p: Do you want vegetarian options at restaurants?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có muốn món chay hay không. 2) Nói if restaurants often have them.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want...' or 'No, I do not want...' and frequency adverb.
e.s: Yes, I want vegetarian options. They sometimes have them.

e.p: How many vegetarian dishes are on the menu?
e.m: 1) Nói số món chay (one/two/many). 2) Nói if you try them.
e.h: Use 'There are + number + dishes.' and 'I try / I do not try.'
e.s: There are two vegetarian dishes. I try them.

e.p: Would you like to try a vegetarian meal now?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có muốn thử hay không. 2) Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I would like...' or 'No, I would not like...' + reason.
e.s: Yes, I would like to try a vegetarian meal. Because I want to try new food.

e.p: The soup is cold. What do you say?
e.m: 1) Nói món không ổn (cold). 2) Yêu cầu đổi hoặc hâm nóng.
e.h: Use 'It is not ok.' and 'Please...'
e.s: It is cold. Please heat it.

e.p: I am allergic to nuts. Can you help?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có dị ứng hoặc không. 2) Nói bạn need a new dish or information.
e.h: Use 'I am allergic to...' and 'I need...'
e.s: I am allergic to nuts. I need a new dish.

e.p: The food is too salty. What do you do?
e.m: 1) Nói phản ứng của bạn (ask for change/stop eating). 2) Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use 'I ask for...' or 'I stop eating.' + reason.
e.s: I ask for a new dish. Because it is too salty.

e.p: There is hair in the food. How do you respond?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn thấy vấn đề. 2) Nói bạn want the staff to fix it.
e.h: Use 'I see...' and 'Please...'
e.s: I see hair in my food. Please change it.

e.p: You ordered a vegetarian dish but it has meat.
e.m: 1) Nói món không đúng. 2) Nói bạn want a refund or a correct dish.
e.h: Use 'It is not correct.' and 'I want...'
e.s: The dish is not correct. I want a refund.

e.p: What food do you eat at festivals?
e.m: 1) Nói 1 món bạn ăn ở lễ hội. 2) Nói if you eat it often during the festival.
e.h: Use 'I eat...' and frequency adverb.
e.s: I eat sweet rice at festivals. I eat it often.

e.p: Do you cook special food for celebrations?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có nấu món đặc biệt hay không. 2) Nói what you cook if yes.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I cook...' or 'No, I do not cook.'
e.s: Yes, I cook special food. I cook sticky rice.

e.p: How many people join your festival meal?
e.m: 1) Nói số người tham gia. 2) Nói if everyone eats together or in groups.
e.h: Use 'There are + number + people.' and 'We eat together / in groups.'
e.s: There are ten people. We eat together.

e.p: Do you like sweet or salty festival food?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn thích ngọt hay mặn. 2) Nói ví dụ một món bạn thích.
e.h: Use 'I like sweet/salty.' and 'For example...'
e.s: I like sweet food. For example, sticky rice.

e.p: Will you bring food to the festival next week?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có mang thức ăn đến hay không. 2) Nói what you will bring.
e.h: Use 'I will bring...' and 'Yes/No.'
e.s: Yes, I will bring food. I will bring fruit.

d.t: Ôn tập: Món ăn và đồ uống

e.p: What is your favorite meal and why?
e.m: 1) Nói tên bữa ăn yêu thích (breakfast/lunch/dinner). 2) Nói lý do ngắn (taste/time/family).
e.h: I like + meal. Because + reason.
e.s: I like dinner. Because I eat with my family.

e.p: How many meals do you eat a day?
e.m: 1) Nói số bữa bạn ăn. 2) Nói if you sometimes skip a meal.
e.h: Use 'I eat + number + meals.' and 'sometimes / always.'
e.s: I eat three meals a day. I sometimes skip dinner.

e.p: Do you prefer hot or cold drinks?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn thích nóng hay lạnh. 2) Nói ví dụ một đồ uống bạn thích.
e.h: I prefer + hot/cold. For example...
e.s: I prefer hot drinks. For example, tea.

e.p: Where do you usually buy food?
e.m: 1) Nói nơi bạn thường mua đồ ăn (market/supermarket/store). 2) Nói if you go there often.
e.h: Use 'I buy food at...' and frequency adverb.
e.s: I buy food at the market. I go there often.

e.p: What do you do if you do not like a dish?
e.m: 1) Nói phản ứng của bạn (ask for change/stop eating). 2) Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use 'I ask for...' or 'I stop eating.' + because...
e.s: I stop eating the dish. Because it tastes bad.

d.t: Ôn tập: Nhà hàng và mua đồ

e.p: Do you prefer to order or cook at home?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn thích gọi đồ hay nấu ở nhà. 2) Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: I prefer + to V / noun. Because...
e.s: I prefer to cook at home. Because it is cheap.

e.p: How much does a meal usually cost where you live?
e.m: 1) Nói giá trung bình cho một bữa. 2) Nói if it is expensive or cheap.
e.h: Use 'It costs...' and 'It is expensive/cheap.'
e.s: A meal costs five dollars. It is cheap.

e.p: Who cooks in your family usually?
e.m: 1) Nói ai thường nấu ăn. 2) Nói if you help them or not.
e.h: Use 'My... cooks.' and 'I help / I do not help.'
e.s: My mother cooks usually. I help sometimes.

e.p: Do you like trying new restaurants?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có thích thử nhà hàng mới hay không. 2) Nói how often you try.
e.h: Use 'I like / I do not like.' and frequency adverb.
e.s: Yes, I like trying new restaurants. I try them sometimes.

e.p: Can you list two foods you do not eat?
e.m: 1) Nói hai món bạn không ăn. 2) Nói lý do ngắn cho mỗi món.
e.h: Use 'I do not eat...' + because...
e.s: I do not eat fish. Because I do not like it. I do not eat mushrooms. Because I am allergic.

d.t: Ôn tập: Vấn đề và lễ hội

e.p: What do you do if food is cold at a party?
e.m: 1) Nói phản ứng của bạn (ask to heat/change). 2) Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use 'I ask...' and 'Because...'
e.s: I ask them to heat the food. Because I want warm food.

e.p: Do you bring food to a party?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có mang thức ăn hay không. 2) Nói what you bring.
e.h: Use 'I bring...' and Yes/No.
e.s: Yes, I bring food to a party. I bring salad.

e.p: How many people eat at your family festival?
e.m: 1) Nói số người tham gia. 2) Nói if you cook for all or buy food.
e.h: Use 'There are + number + people.' and 'I cook / I buy.'
e.s: There are twelve people. We buy some food.

e.p: Do you like sweet festival food more than normal food?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn thích hơn hay không. 2) Nói ví dụ một món ăn lễ hội.
e.h: Use 'I like it more / less.' and 'For example...'
e.s: I like sweet festival food more. For example, sweet rice.

e.p: What should you do if someone is allergic at a party?
e.m: 1) Nói việc bạn nên làm (tell host/avoid nuts). 2) Nói if you help find safe food.
e.h: Use 'Tell...' and 'I will help / I will not help.'
e.s: Tell the host about the allergy. I will help find safe food.
